expandedPrompt: A cheerful baseball dude with an oversized expressive head and a compact connected body. He has a bright smile showcasing excitement for the game. His outfit consists of a classic baseball jersey with stripes, a pair of baseball pants, and a baseball cap with rounded crown, panel seams, top button, and curved front brim. The character's skin is a warm tan color, and he has short, tousled brown hair peeking out from under the cap. His eyes are large and sparkling with enthusiasm. He holds a baseball bat in one hand and wears a pair of white sneakers with blue accents.

rawReactCssCharacterContent:
{
  "componentName": "BaseballDude",
  "styleSystem": "my-dude-react-css-scaffold",
  "title": "Baseball Dude",
  "summary": "A cheerful baseball player with an oversized head and a compact body, ready to swing his bat.",
  "cssVariables": {
    "--dude-primary": "#38bdf8",
    "--dude-secondary": "#ffffff",
    "--dude-accent": "#ff0000",
    "--dude-eye": "#e0f2fe",
    "--dude-panel": "rgba(255,255,255,.18)",
    "--dude-mouth": "#0f172a",
    "--dude-body": "#d69e6e",
    "--dude-arm": "#d69e6e",
    "--dude-hand": "#facc15",
    "--dude-leg": "#1e293b",
    "--dude-foot": "#facc15"
  },
  "headShape": "rounded",
  "bodyShape": "suited",
  "expression": "excited",
  "parts": [
    { "type": "hat", "label": "baseball cap", "tone": "primary" },
    { "type": "eye", "label": "large sparkling eyes", "tone": "eye" },
    { "type": "mouth", "label": "bright smile", "tone": "mouth" },
    { "type": "body", "label": "baseball jersey with stripes", "tone": "secondary" },
    { "type": "body", "label": "baseball pants", "tone": "leg" },
    { "type": "foot", "label": "white sneakers with blue accents", "tone": "foot" }
  ],
  "customPrimitives": [
    {
      "id": "baseball-bat",
      "groupId": "baseball",
      "label": "baseball bat",
      "anchor": "rightHand",
      "shape": "rect",
      "x": 10,
      "y": 0,
      "width": 10,
      "height": 60,
      "rotate": 0,
      "tone": "primary",
      "outline": true,
      "held": true,
      "gripX": 0.5,
      "gripY": 0.9
    }
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Character has a baseball cap on his head.",
    "The outfit includes a classic baseball jersey and pants.",
    "He holds a baseball bat in his right hand."
  ]
}
